title: Statement on the situation in Nepal: FCDO response
body: "A Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office spokesperson said:    The recent loss of life and violence in Nepal is appalling. The UK supports fundamental freedoms and respect for human rights, including the right to protest and peaceful assembly. We urge all sides to end the violence and find a peaceful way forward.   British nationals in Nepal should follow travel advice, avoid protests, check local media for updates and follow direction of the local authorities. Our Embassy in Kathmandu remains open and British nationals in need of consular assistance can contact the Foreign Office 24/7.    Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
